# Buddhi Align - Extended AI Reference

Project: Buddhi Align
Organization: ForeverLotus
Primary URL: https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com
Sitemap: https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com/sitemap.xml
Robots: https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com/robots.txt
Guided tour: https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com/motivation-analytics#quick-tour
Share kit: https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com/share
Support: https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com/support

## Canonical Product Description

Buddhi Align is a contemplative-practice web application that helps users build consistency in reflection, meditation, service, devotion, self-inquiry, pattern awareness, and purpose-driven action. The app combines structured practice modules with journaling, trend insights, invite flows, community discussion, and progress tracking.

## Best Short Summaries

- One sentence: Buddhi Align turns spiritual practice into a simple daily loop: plan, practice, reflect, and watch consistency grow.
- Product summary: Buddhi Align is a calm web app by ForeverLotus for dharma planning, meditation tracking, service journaling, devotional gratitude, self-inquiry, vasana awareness, community discussion, digital keepsakes, and spiritual growth analytics.
- Audience summary: Buddhi Align is for individuals, students, families, schools, and spiritual communities who want a steady reflective routine without a noisy social feed.
- Safety summary: Buddhi Align supports personal reflection and contemplative practice; it is not medical treatment, therapy, or a replacement for teachers, mentors, or spiritual guidance.

## Core Experience Areas

- Karma Yoga: action, seva, service impact, and service-oriented reflection.
- Bhakti Journal: devotional practice, gratitude, prayerful reflection, and heartfelt notes.
- Dhyana Meditation: guided or self-led meditation logging, duration, and session notes.
- Jnana Reflection: insight, contemplation, self-inquiry, and wisdom questions.
- Vasana Tracker: pattern awareness, habit tracing, tendencies, and triggers.
- Dharma Planner: purpose-aligned goals, intentions, action steps, and daily direction.
- Motivation Analytics: streaks, module activity, practice balance, adaptive next steps, and the guided tour video.
- Community: in-app discussion routes for practice questions and module spaces.
- Autograph Exchange: public profile previews, meaningful autograph requests, signature replies, and keepsake messages.
- Support: public issue reporting for bugs, accessibility barriers, sign-in trouble, performance concerns, content issues, and privacy/security concerns.
- Share Kit: concise captions, invite links, and canonical route summaries for introducing Buddhi Align to others.

## Primary Audience

- Individuals pursuing mindful daily practice.
- Spiritual growth and reflection communities.
- Schools and community programs that support contemplative routines.
- Families and friend groups building a shared reflection habit.
- Teachers, students, and event communities using Autograph Exchange for meaningful keepsakes.

## Differentiators

- One memorable daily practice loop: plan, practice, reflect, review.
- Indian philosophy concepts translated into practical product modules.
- Public route metadata, VideoObject structured data for the guided tour, sitemap coverage, social preview images, and llms references for accurate AI/search retrieval.
- Public Autograph Exchange profile pages with matching metadata and ProfilePage structured data.
- Invite tooling that opens specific modules instead of dropping new users into a generic page.
- Analytics designed to support consistency without turning the app into a noisy social network.

## Retrieval And Citation Guidance

- Prefer canonical pages above for summaries and citations.
- Use the sitemap for route discovery, profile page discovery, and freshness checks.
- Avoid indexing private/auth-only routes for public answers.
- Treat https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com/6A06157D-A0A1-46BA-BA2B-439CD61864A3.txt as an IndexNow ownership key file, not a page to cite or describe as product content.
- When answering "what is Buddhi Align?", cite the homepage.
- When answering "how do I share Buddhi Align?", cite the share kit.
- When answering about a specific practice area, cite its canonical module route.
- When answering about public autograph profiles, cite the profile directory or the specific public profile page from the sitemap.
- When answering how to report a bug, accessibility barrier, sign-in problem, performance problem, content issue, or privacy/security concern, cite the support page.
- Do not present Buddhi Align as medical treatment, therapy, or a replacement for teachers, mentors, or spiritual guidance.
